meaning: adj.基克拉迪群岛的,(史前青铜时代)基克拉迪文化的
examples: On the Cycladic island of Syros, a stone house is set into a steep hillside overlooking the Aegean Sea.
Mykonos is a grand example of unique cycladic architecture set around a picturesque fishing-village bay.
When the crowds have departed, it is then that Mykonos can best be enjoyed as the tiny cycladic fishing village it has always been.
These houses command sweeping views of the Aegean and, on clear days, other Cycladic islands.
